name: reversible_write_probe_undo_transformer
single_primitive: nonlinear volume-preserving history write, candidate probe, reverse history undo, reverse probe undo; inject only the candidate-centered closed-loop displacement
architecture_locus: candidate-token FFN state between lower and upper Transformer blocks

evidence_paths.exact_recurrence: shared history/candidate item-ID embedding into shared coupling axes
evidence_paths.no_history: identity write composition and exact zero overwrite under history mask

load_bearing_nonreduction: a history map may fix the ordinary endpoint z0 but change a probe-perturbed state, yielding a nonzero loop residual
matched_control: same-parameter ordinary terminal-vector memory using W_H z0 and the same candidate axes/readout
stop_if: learned loop does not beat the matched ordinary endpoint memory
same-backbone generic history attention matches the loop
wrong, shuffled, query-masked, or disjoint evidence reproduces the true effect
no-history output differs from the frozen query-only anchor
